reviews.review_description: When I initially reviewed this game, I was kind of on the fence about it.  I loved the atmosphere, the stalking Elara creature, the objective of the game and the overall vibe.  It had a haunting atmosphere that was genuinely spooky and the creature was scary.  I loved all those aspects of the game.  However, what I didn't love was the cumbersome "RUN" controls and the fact that Elara could see me through walls.  These issues made the game frustratingly difficult, especially the fact she could see me through walls meaning I could never get away from her, could never hide and never had a moment to catch my breath.  It turned what initially started out as fun, into a game I wanted to love, but overall was a chore to play.  So, I left a 3-star review explaining my experience and the developer took notice of it.  He reached out and I was able to explain in full detail what my experience was like and then without question he implemented the changes.  He changed the "RUN" controls, fixed Elara's wall hack glitch and turned what initially was just an okay game into one that I now thoroughly enjoy and recommend.  The controls are so much smoother now and navigating through the game has never felt better.  Fixing Elara's wall hack glitch has made the game massively better.  She now can only see you with direct line of sight or glimpsing you through a window.  She also has the ability to hear any excessive noise you create, yet instead of knowing exactly where you are, she has to come an investigate first.  This is such a huge improvement.  I give the game five stars because first and foremost it is fun, has an awesome spooky vibe and the fact that the developer really cares about his game shows that it's not some quick cash grab.  He wants to make it as excellent as possible and I appreciate that immensely.  So, without going any further let me say that I highly recommend this to anyone looking for a fun little horror title.  It's well worth the price!

This is a great game, the jumpscares are spot on in placement and timing, the constantly lurking creature and sound of footsteps keeps you in suspense, the items are cool and vary in location each playthrough making for a different experience each time, I definitely recommend playing this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the 5-star review! I am thrilled to hear the jumpscares and the lurking creature are keeping you on your toes. 😱 Our goal was to create that constant sense of dread through sound and timing, so it's awesome to know it's working!

reviews.review_description:
I just started and this reminds me of resident evil 2.
The scariest thing is the constant sound of footsteps approaching to me. The spatial sound effect is well implemented, so you have to know the direction and run away in advance, but it is not easy because there are objects that can make large noise everywhere and items to be collected are hard to find and locations are vary.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! Being compared to a masterpiece like Resident Evil 2 is a huge honor. Using sound to navigate is a key part of the experience, so I'm thrilled you're finding it both immersive and scary. Watch your step around those noisy objects, and good luck finding those items!
